ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Group in which the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "team1_win" INTEGER /* Whether the first team won (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "team2_win" INTEGER /* Whether the second team won (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "tie" INTEGER /* Whether the match ended in a tie (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., group stage, quarterfinal, semifinal) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Group A, Group B) */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., Group Stage, Knockout Stage) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Group to which the team is assigned */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Group in which the team is playing */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of matches tied by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals_for - goals_against) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (3 points for a win, 1 point for a tie) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "old_data" TEXT /* Old data before the action */,
  "new_data" TEXT /* New data after the action */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, public viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
